title: The Final Clash Nears
description: Doflamingo tries to crush the country before Luffy can return to the fight.
scene: On pages 4–8, Luffy, King Riku, Sabo, Trafalgar Law, Doflamingo move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's the revolutionary army's Chief of Staff!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: I'm SABO of the revolutionary army.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Got something you wanna say to him, burgers?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Those words... it's like deja vu all over again...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You must have heard them from fire fist ace.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You blackbeard pirates are the ones that captured ace during that battle on Banaro Island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: and that ended up becoming the trigger for that horrific "war of the greatest."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The war that cost ace his life. Although I don't have an axe to grind with your crew,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: From here on out, I'll be the one watching Luffy's back.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Uiiii hahaha! This is me giving a shit about your dumbass sob story!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: I don't have any business with you or your stinkin' Revolu- Tionary army!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: On the contrary, perhaps we do have some... personal business?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Oi, Luffy! You've seen better days!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: DOFLA- MINGO'S GONNA BE COMING ANY MINUTE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: And I'm gonna have my hands full with burgers!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: don't worry... cats and his guys said they'll buy me some time.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: I'll finish off Mingo... you have my word!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Hehe! You've gotten more dependable, I see. Well then, leave this one to me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: It's a memento of his! I wasn't gonna let anyone else have it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Right then, I'm counting on you, pets!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: He just swatted away a yonkou's crewmember!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Crap, he's strong! I guess that's to be expected from the revolutionary army's No. 2!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Looks like I'm his new target now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Which means the rumors were true...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: He hunts and picks off devil fruit users...!

summary: This part focuses on the final clash nears, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
